titleStmt.title: SII 8.215: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 215. (A.R. No. 618 of 1902). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE MANDAPA IN FRONT OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE KAPARDISVARA TEMPLE AT TIRUVALANJULI, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīḥ— tiripuvaṉaccakra vattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamum karuvūrum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyum koṇṭu virābhiṣe ka(m)mum vijayāchiṣe ka(m)mum paṇṇiyaruḷiya śrītiripuvaṉaviratevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 9Āvatu kumpanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu pratha- maiyum putaṉkiḻa(m)maiyum peṟṟa makattu nāḷ Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭup pāmpūr(n)nāṭṭut tirukkuṭamukkuṭaiyār tiruvalañcuḻiuṭaiyār koyi(l)lil Āticaṇṭeśva rateva mmaneṉ nāṭṭu Iṉṉamparnāṭṭu
konilattuk kāṇiuṭaiya pālaivāyiluṭaiyāṉ Uttamacoḻaṉ piḷḷaiveḷāṉ pāriyai Āṇṭā(ḷ)ḷen Innāya(n)nāṟkut tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka nirvārttuk kuṭutta nila(m)mum maṉaiyum Āvatu Eṉtampi nallampūruṭaiyān Uṭaiyān peril Aṉṉiyanāmakaraṇattil koṉila(m)muṭaiyāṉ Iṉṉamparnāṭṭuveḷāṉpakkal vilaikoṇṭu Ipperil pakiṟṟuvarukiṟa Ivvūr vaḷavaṉcatirattu motiraṅkoḷḷivāykkālukku vaṭakku lakaṅka nilattukku vaṭakku
meṟkum vāykkālukku kiḻakkum naṭuvupaṭṭu Enṉutāyirunta kuḻi 2 100 5 10- ṉāl nilam 2� Innilam IrumāvaraiyumThe inscription is left unfinished.
Digital edition of SII 8.215 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
